auth.sessionExpired: Session expired, please sign in again

errors.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
errors.usernameTooShort: Username must be at least 3 characters
errors.usernamePattern: Username may only contain letters, digits, underscores and Chinese characters
errors.passwordMismatch: The two passwords do not match

sidebar.deleteSessionMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this session? This action cannot be undone.

workspace.needModelConfig: Please configure a model connection first
workspace.waitingUpload: Please wait for the image upload to finish

workspace.codeExportEmpty: No exportable code in this conversation

workspace.streamResumeFailed: Could not resume the in-progress reply: {{message}}

workspace.expandThinking: Click to expand the reasoning trace
workspace.promptHint: Enter your question in the box below
workspace.changeModel: Click to switch or configure model

launchpad.title: Start building with AI
launchpad.subtitle: Pick a provider, add your API key in settings, then chat. Unconfigured providers open the connection dialog.
launchpad.noMatch: No matching providers in this category
launchpad.configureFirst: Configure {{name}} first — add your API key

deepseek.title: DeepSeek
deepseek.desc: Strong reasoning and coding; enter your DeepSeek API key to use deepseek-chat or deepseek-reasoner.

openai.title: OpenAI (GPT)
openai.desc: Official OpenAI API — use your key and model ID (e.g. gpt-4o).

gemini.title: Google Gemini
gemini.desc: Google multimodal API — add your key and pick a Gemini model ID.

qwen.title: Qwen (DashScope)
qwen.desc: Alibaba Cloud compatible API — your key unlocks Qwen text and vision models.

openrouter.title: OpenRouter
openrouter.desc: One API key for many hosted models (OpenAI, Anthropic, Meta, etc.).

ollama.title: Ollama (local)
ollama.desc: Run models locally on port 11434 — usually no API key required.

connection.title: Configure model connection
connection.subtitle: Choose and configure your LLM inference backend
connection.modelIdHint: See the {{name}} documentation for the exact model ID.
connection.keepKey: Existing key — leave blank to keep
connection.keyPlaceholderLocal: Usually no key needed for local mode
connection.keyPlaceholderKeep: Leave blank to keep the existing key

instructions.title: System instructions
instructions.subtitle: Manage your system prompt templates
instructions.formContentLabel: Optional model tone and style instructions
instructions.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this prompt?
instructions.emptyHint: Click the button above to create one
instructions.footerNote: System prompts are stored in the database and only visible to you

sessionHistory.title: History
sessionHistory.emptyHint: Start a new conversation; it will be saved here

panel.title: Travel Agent panel
panel.subtitle: Model and agent runtime parameters
panel.modelHint: Model is provided by BYOK config in main workspace Settings

export.noContent: No plan content to export yet
export.popupBlocked: Could not open print window — allow pop-ups and retry
export.formalPlanReadyBanner: Formal plan is ready to view or export
export.modelRequired: Configure a model connection in Settings first
export.verifiedFootnote: This plan was structured from Agent-verified tool data. Recheck live info before travel.
export.unverifiedFootnote: This plan was AI-formatted. Verify transport, prices, and opening hours before travel.
export.exportCalendarSuccess: Calendar file downloaded — import into your calendar app
export.waitForPlan: Finish an Agent planning reply first
export.generateFirstHint: Generate a formal plan before exporting
export.sessionRequired: Session is not ready yet — wait for the chat to save before generating
export.formalPlanStaleBanner: Chat changed — regenerate the formal plan
export.formalPlanStaleHint: No need for a new chat — click Generate formal plan in this session

fitness.disclaimer: For lifestyle logging and calorie estimates only — not medical advice. Treat "estimate" labels with caution.

panel.title: Today panel
panel.subtitle: Goal, intake & meal records
panel.noEntriesHint: Tell the agent what you ate in chat

chat.placeholder: e.g. lunch: rice bowl, tomato & eggs…
chat.requestFailed: Request failed — check backend & model config
chat.emptyReply: Done, but no text reply was generated
chat.modelRequired: Configure a model connection in Settings first

progress.webSearch: Searching the web for calorie references…
progress.llmEstimate: No reliable hit, estimating with model…
progress.slow: (This step is taking longer than usual, still working...)

logLunch.title: Log lunch
logLunch.desc: Tell me what you ate — I'll estimate calories
logLunch.question: What did you have for lunch? Describe the dishes and portions. I'll estimate calories first, then log after you confirm.
logLunch.placeholder: e.g. rice bowl, tomato & eggs, half a cola
logLunch.sendTemplate: I'd like to log lunch. I had: {{answer}}

recommend.title: Dinner ideas
recommend.desc: About {{remaining}} kcal left — smart meal picks
recommend.question: What kind of dinner are you in the mood for? Any restrictions or preferences? (You have about {{remaining}} kcal left today.)
recommend.placeholder: e.g. light, no spicy, more protein
recommend.sendTemplate: Recommend dinner based on my preferences. About {{remaining}} kcal left. My preferences: {{answer}}

setGoal.title: Set goal
setGoal.question: What daily calorie goal would you like? (Current goal: {{goal}} kcal)
setGoal.sendTemplate: Set my daily calorie goal to {{answer}} kcal

hitl.subtitle: This will update your diary or goal. Please confirm before proceeding.
hitl.replyPlaceholder: Reply "confirm" or "cancel", or use the card above
hitl.replyHint: An action is awaiting confirmation. Reply "confirm" or "cancel", or use the yellow card above.

panel.title: Spider control panel
panel.subtitle: Workspace files and workflow
panel.noSession: Start a conversation to see workspace files
panel.syncing: Task running — file list updates automatically
panel.modelHint: Use an official API model (e.g. DeepSeek / OpenAI). Small local Ollama models may fail at code generation.

chat.placeholder: Describe your crawler task, e.g. scrape movie titles and links from the homepage…
chat.urlHint: Fill in a list-page URL first (not just a site homepage). The agent will run analysis, codegen, execution, and cleaning.
chat.emptyDescription: Provide a target site and requirements. The agent handles analysis, generation, execution, and cleaning.
chat.suggestion1Prompt: Analyze the target site structure and scrape movie titles and links
chat.suggestion2Title: Scrape list titles, ratings, and details
chat.suggestion2Prompt: Scrape list page titles, ratings, and detail links
chat.suggestion3Title: Generate code and run in sandbox
chat.suggestion3Prompt: Generate spider code, run in sandbox, and output cleaned JSON
chat.suggestion1: Analyze https://movie.douban.com/top250 and scrape movie titles and links
chat.suggestion2: Scrape list page titles, ratings, and detail links
chat.suggestion3: Generate spider code, run in sandbox, and output cleaned JSON
chat.streamError: Stream interrupted. Check backend, Docker, and model config.
chat.restoreInterrupted: Page refresh interrupted the live run. Workspace files on the right will sync automatically; if the backend is still running, new outputs will appear shortly.
chat.modelRequired: Configure a model connection in settings first

failure.recoverableHint: You can adjust the input and retry.

files.title: Workspace files
files.subtitle: View output files from the Docker sandbox
files.empty: Select a file from the list to preview
files.unsupported: This file type cannot be previewed. You can download it instead.
